ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., VV, VEU) */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., ETF, Stock, Bond) */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the asset (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the asset is traded (e.g., US, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "issuer_website" TEXT /* The official website of the asset issuer */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* The current status of the asset (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* The last date when the asset information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_data" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "asset_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first asset in the correlation pair */,
  "asset_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second asset in the correlation pair */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation value between the two assets */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the correlation was calculated */,
  "time_window" TEXT /* The time window over which the correlation is calculated (e.g., 30 days, 1 year) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* The confidence interval of the correlation value */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the correlation (e.g., Pearson, Spearman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_data_asset_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id_2") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_data_asset_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id_1") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the asset traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price of the asset, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* The stock split ratio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_prices_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the asset */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP (Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures) of the asset */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* SEDOL (Stock Exchange Daily Official List) of the asset */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "asset_category" TEXT /* A more detailed category of the asset (e.g., Large Cap, Small Cap) */,
  "asset_subclass" TEXT /* A subcategory of the asset class (e.g., Growth, Value) */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* The fiscal year-end date of the asset issuer */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the asset */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The dividend yield of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Investment, Risk Management) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The last date when the user logged into the system */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlation data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlation_data ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return data */,
  "daily_return" REAL /* Daily return of the asset */,
  "monthly_return" REAL /* Monthly return of the asset */,
  "annual_return" REAL /* Annual return of the asset */,
  "intraday_return" REAL /* Intraday return of the asset */,
  "annualized_volatility" REAL /* Annualized volatility of the asset returns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_returns_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the asset */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the asset */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the asset */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset */,
  "sortino_ratio" REAL /* Sortino ratio of the asset */,
  "treynor_ratio" REAL /* Treynor ratio of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_performance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_risk" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset */,
  "risk_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk data */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at Risk (VaR) of the asset */,
  "expected_shortfall" REAL /* Expected Shortfall (ES) of the asset */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum Drawdown of the asset */,
  "downside_risk" REAL /* Downside risk of the asset */,
  "upside_potential" REAL /* Upside potential of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_risk_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
